title: Device Settings - All toggles ON - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle button states in Device Settings do not persist after closing/reopening tabs, returning to Device Home Screen, or restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on a connected device to enter Device Settings
Toggle ON any toggle button (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications)
Close the Device Settings tab (navigate back to Home screen)
Reopen Device Settings for the same device
Fully close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate again to Device Settings for the same device
expected: All toggle buttons in Device Settings remain in the ON state after closing and reopening tabs, returning to the Device Home Screen, and restarting the app.
